svg.style: color-scheme: light dark; background-color: light-dark(white, black);

div.title: An Application Profile identifies classes and properties from vocabularies, and class profiles and property profiles from Application profiles that are re-used in a certain usage context. It also allows specification editors to further adjust the description of re-used classes and properties for that usage context without the need to explicitly create subclasses and subproperties.
